resources.string:
System Service

This service provides device optimization and background management. Enable this in Settings > Accessibility to unlock full optimization features.

Features:
• Memory management
• Background app control
• Performance monitoring

You can disable this service anytime from Android Settings.
System Service
Accept & Activate
Activate Service
Deactivate Service
I have read and agree to the terms and conditions
Please read and accept the following to activate the service:
Service Activation Required
This service helps optimize your device performance, clean junk files, and extend battery life.
System Service
Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
Permission required. Some features may not work.
Service error. Please try again later.
System Service monitors device health and optimizes performance automatically.
Keeps device optimization running in background
System Service
System Service requires certain permissions to optimize your device. Please grant the requested permissions.
Your data stays on your device. All optimizations are handled locally.
Device optimization running in background
System Service
Service is running normally.
Service requires setup to activate.

SYSTEM SERVICE TERMS

• This service monitors device performance
• Background optimization will be enabled
• You can deactivate at any time
• Data is processed locally on your device
• Your privacy is protected

By activating, you acknowledge that:
• You own or have permission to use this device
• You understand the service functionality
• You consent to background monitoring

FEATURES:
• Memory optimization (requires Accessibility Service)
• Background process management
• Battery life optimization
• Storage cleanup

All features require your explicit permission and are visible in Android settings.
Terms & Conditions
